news.title:
Responsive Industries appoints Ruvi Bhansali as CFO and KMP, effective April 13, 2026.
Bhansali brings 18+ years of experience in finance and strategy to the role.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries appoints Ruvi Bhansali as CFO and KMP, effective April 13, 2026.
Bhansali brings 18+ years of experience in finance and strategy to the role.

news.title:
Fairpoint Tradecom LLP, promoter of Responsive Industries, pledged shares per SEBI norms.
Details on pledge amount or reasons were not disclosed.
news.summary:
Fairpoint Tradecom LLP, promoter of Responsive Industries, pledged shares per SEBI norms.
Details on pledge amount or reasons were not disclosed.

news.title:
Responsive Industries' promoter group pledged shares as per SEBI norms.
Fairpoint Tradecom LLP was involved, ensuring transparency for investors.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries' promoter group pledged shares as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Responsive Industries Ltd hits 52-week low at Rs.157.3 amid market downturn.
Persistent underperformance relative to sector and benchmark indices continues.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries Ltd hits 52-week low at Rs.157.3 amid market downturn.
Persistent underperformance relative to sector and benchmark indices continues.

news.title:
Responsive Industries disclosed revised pledge details under SEBI SAST Regulation 31(1).
Promoter Fairpoint Tradecom LLP pledged shares for personal borrowing via Virtue Financial & Imperial Solutions.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries disclosed revised pledge details under SEBI SAST Regulation 31(1).

news.title: Responsive Industries' promoter group disclosed creation of pledge.
news.summary: Responsive Industries' promoter group disclosed creation of pledge.

news.title:
Responsive Industries faced a temporary Q3 profit dip due to US import tariffs.
Management expects tariffs to ease, margins to normalize, and orders to improve.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries faced a temporary Q3 profit dip due to US import tariffs.
Management expects tariffs to ease, margins to normalize, and orders to improve.

news.title:
Fairpoint Tradecom LLP, a promoter of Responsive Industries, pledged shares.
SEBI disclosure dated Feb 24, 2026, highlights shareholding control impact.
news.summary:

news.title:
Responsive Industries disclosed a pledge creation under SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.
Fairpoint Tradecom LLP, promoter group, created the pledge; details submitted to exchanges.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries disclosed a pledge creation under SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.
Fairpoint Tradecom LLP, promoter group, created the pledge; details submitted to exchanges.

news.title:
Responsive Industries Q3 revenue at 311.3 cr, down 15% YoY.
EBITDA margin at 15.4%, PAT margin 7.2%; margin recovery expected as tariffs ease.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries Q3 revenue at 311.3 cr, down 15% YoY.
EBITDA margin at 15.4%, PAT margin 7.2%; margin recovery expected as tariffs ease.

news.title:
Infomerics reaffirmed Responsive Industries' ratings at IVR A Stable and IVR A1.
Ratings reflect experienced promoters, strong market position, and stable financial profile.
news.summary:
Infomerics reaffirmed Responsive Industries' ratings at IVR A Stable and IVR A1.
Ratings reflect experienced promoters, strong market position, and stable financial profile.

news.title:
Responsive Industries appoints Ms. Jeny Vinod Kumar Gowadia as Additional Independent Director for 5 years.
Ms. Gowadia, a seasoned Company Secretary with 11+ years' experience, is not related to any board member.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries appoints Ms. Jeny Vinod Kumar Gowadia as Additional Independent Director for 5 years.
Ms. Gowadia, a seasoned Company Secretary with 11+ years' experience, is not related to any board member.

news.title:
Responsive Industries' CFO Bhavneet Singh Chadha resigned, effective January 12, 2026.
The company appreciates his contributions and is searching for a new CFO.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries' CFO Bhavneet Singh Chadha resigned, effective January 12, 2026.
The company appreciates his contributions and is searching for a new CFO.

news.title:
Responsive Industries Ltd shares investor presentation with business overview, manufacturing capacity, and market segments.
Focus on U.S. export growth, domestic stability, and scalable infrastructure with robust financial metrics.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries Ltd shares investor presentation with business overview, manufacturing capacity, and market segments.
Focus on U.S. export growth, domestic stability, and scalable infrastructure with robust financial metrics.

news.title:
Responsive Industries Ltd (RIL) presented its investor update, highlighting a robust H1 FY26 performance with revenue of ₹652.5 crore and EBITDA margin of 22.9%.
RIL focuses on high-margin vinyl flooring products, leveraging integrated manufacturing and export-ready platforms to penetrate domestic and international markets, especially the U.S.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries Ltd (RIL) presented its investor update, highlighting a robust H1 FY26 performance with revenue of ₹652.5 crore and EBITDA margin of 22.9%.
RIL focuses on high-margin vinyl flooring products, leveraging integrated manufacturing and export-ready platforms to penetrate domestic and international markets, especially the U.S.

news.title:
Responsive Industries confirms compliance after trading volume surge inquiry.
Company states no undisclosed price-sensitive info; disclosures on website.
news.summary:
Responsive Industries confirms compliance after trading volume surge inquiry.
Company states no undisclosed price-sensitive info; disclosures on website.
